mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly job gains above 100k signal robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 130k, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production above 95 signals strengthening manufacturing activity that supports corporate profit growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 20d returns in 50%+ of cases where INDPRO exceeds 95, or the signal's IC falls below 0.04 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and stable inflation signals a strong economic expansion that boosts corporate earnings and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint effect of GDPC1 and CPIAUCSL fails to predict SPX returns with IC > 0.05 in 3-year rolling windows, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Rising residential sales and housing starts indicate strong consumer confidence and demand for durable goods, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns during high-demand macro regimes.
failure_condition: The combined signal of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict SPX returns with IC > 0.04 in 3-year rolling windows, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in inflation expectations combined with low policy rates signals accommodative monetary conditions that support equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint effect of CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS fails to predict SPX returns with IC > 0.03 in 1-year rolling windows, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in unemployment below 8% signals tightening labor markets that drive wage growth and corporate profit margins, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 20d returns in 50%+ of cases where UNRATE falls below 8.0, or the signal's IC drops below 0.04 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production above 95 combined with rising housing starts indicates strong economic activity that supports corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint effect of INDPRO and HOUST fails to predict SPX returns with IC > 0.03 in 3-year rolling windows, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.1).
